537 private static IntPtr INTERNAL_AllocUTF8(string str)

549 // Token: 0x0600060E RID: 1550 RVA: 0x000040F4 File Offset: 0x000022F4
550 public unsafe static int SDL_ShowMessageBox([In] ref SDL.SDL_MessageBoxData messageboxdata, out int buttonid)
551 {
552 SDL.INTERNAL_SDL_MessageBoxData internal_SDL_MessageBoxData = new SDL.INTERNAL_SDL_MessageBoxData
553 {
554 flags = messageboxdata.flags,
555 window = messageboxdata.window,
556 title = SDL.INTERNAL_AllocUTF8(messageboxdata.title),
557 message = SDL.INTERNAL_AllocUTF8(messageboxdata.message),
558 numbuttons = messageboxdata.numbuttons
559 };
560 SDL.INTERNAL_SDL_MessageBoxButtonData[] array = new SDL.INTERNAL_SDL_MessageBoxButtonData[messageboxdata.numbuttons];
561 for (int i = 0; i < messageboxdata.numbuttons; i++)
562 {
563 array[i] = new SDL.INTERNAL_SDL_MessageBoxButtonData
564 {
565 flags = messageboxdata.buttons[i].flags,
566 buttonid = messageboxdata.buttons[i].buttonid,
567 text = SDL.INTERNAL_AllocUTF8(messageboxdata.buttons[i].text)
568 };
569 }
570 if (messageboxdata.colorScheme != null)
571 {
572 internal_SDL_MessageBoxData.colorScheme = Marshal.AllocHGlobal(SDL.SizeOf<SDL.SDL_MessageBoxColorScheme>());
573 Marshal.StructureToPtr(messageboxdata.colorScheme.Value, internal_SDL_MessageBoxData.colorScheme, false);
574 }
575 int num;
576 fixed (SDL.INTERNAL_SDL_MessageBoxButtonData* ptr = &array[0])
577 {
578 SDL.INTERNAL_SDL_MessageBoxButtonData* ptr2 = ptr;
579 internal_SDL_MessageBoxData.buttons = (IntPtr)((void*)ptr2);
580 num = SDL.INTERNAL_SDL_ShowMessageBox(ref internal_SDL_MessageBoxData, out buttonid);
581 }
582 Marshal.FreeHGlobal(internal_SDL_MessageBoxData.colorScheme);
583 for (int j = 0; j < messageboxdata.numbuttons; j++)
584 {
585 SDL.SDL_free(array[j].text);
586 }
587 SDL.SDL_free(internal_SDL_MessageBoxData.message);
588 SDL.SDL_free(internal_SDL_MessageBoxData.title);
589 return num;
590 }

1684 // Token: 0x06000708 RID: 1800 RVA: 0x00004588 File Offset: 0x00002788

1717 // Token: 0x0600070B RID: 1803 RVA: 0x00004618 File Offset: 0x00002818
1718 public static bool SDL_ISPIXELFORMAT_ALPHA(uint format)

1855 // Token: 0x06000725 RID: 1829 RVA: 0x00004738 File Offset: 0x00002938
1856 public unsafe static IntPtr SDL_CreateShapedWindow(string title, uint x, uint y, uint w, uint h, SDL.SDL_WindowFlags flags)
1857 {

3691 // Token: 0x060008C5 RID: 2245 RVA: 0x00004CB8 File Offset: 0x00002EB8

3696 Marshal.FreeHGlobal((IntPtr)((void*)ptr));
3697 return num;
3698 }
